title: Saltcorn
description: Free and open-source no-code application builder for creating database-backed web apps without writing code.
installation: Image: saltcorn/saltcorn (official). Saltcorn requires PostgreSQL; it connects via the discrete PG* vars pointing at the bundled postgres add-on (host saltcorn-postgresql-rw). Rotate SALTCORN_SESSION_SECRET (any long random string, e.g. `openssl rand -hex 32`) and the Postgres password (default 'saltcorn') before exposing publicly. On first run Saltcorn auto-initializes the schema, then presents a setup wizard to create the admin user and site name - complete this immediately. User-installed plugins, uploaded files and config persist on the /saltcorn volume. Multi-tenant mode is off by default (SALTCORN_MULTI_TENANT=false).
